message:
feat(skill-md): Add SKILL.md auto-generation module

- Create SkillMdGenerator for dynamic SKILL.md content generation
- Include MCP tools and CLI commands documentation
- Add templates.rs for customizable template strings
- Update setup.rs to use new generator instead of inline content
- Add unit tests (10 tests) and integration tests (13 tests)

The generator dynamically documents:
- Core CLI commands with descriptions
- Available MCP tools for agent integration
- Robot mode examples (-O json)
- Context integration settings
- Usage examples

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
